center.name: 甘托克县
center.summary: 甘托克县是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括领岩鹨，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: nipalensis in East Sikkim, India | genus = Prunella | species = collaris | authority = (Scopoli, 1769) | synonyms = *Laiscopus collaris }} The alpine accentor (Prunella collaris) is a small passerine bird in the family Prunellidae, which is native to Eurasia and North Africa
